title: Pink + Gold
excerpt: Our last scrapbooking on-site event for the year was a couple weeks ago at the SLS Hotel. Love that Paige makes it a point to snap photos throughout the evening (when we are able), as I had to leave before…
body:
Our last scrapbooking on-site event for the year was a couple weeks ago at the SLS Hotel.

Love that Paige makes it a point to snap photos throughout the evening (when we are able), as I had to leave before the fun started. Loved the color combo we had to work with - fuchsia and gold, and as always grateful for all of our fabulous clients.
